title: Hegseth's wartime firing of top generals stuns officials: "It's insane"
summary:
The ousters of Army Chief of Staff Gen. Randy George and Army Gen. David Hodne blindsided military leaders and have generated concern among defense officials about the implications for the war in Iran and the longer-term adoption of new tech and tactics.

Why it matters:

title: AI boom drives clash between grid power vs. energy "islands"
summary:
HOUSTON — A high-stakes fight is emerging as the AI boom accelerates: Should data centers plug into the grid, or operate as energy "islands"?

Why it matters: The debate is shaping power flows and multibillion-dollar investments, as data centers rival entire cities in their electricity demand.

Driving the news: Chevron

title: Nvidia Marvell Alliance Extends AI Platform From Data Centers To Telecoms
summary: Nvidia (NasdaqGS:NVDA) announced a US$2b partnership with Marvell focused on connecting Marvell’s custom XPUs and networking products into Nvidia’s NVLink Fusion platform. The agreement extends Nvidia’s AI infrastructure into data centers and telecom networks, including AI powered telecommunications and silicon photonics. The deal also includes work on semi custom AI architectures and AI RAN for 5G and 6G, and involves direct equity investment and ecosystem collaboration. Nvidia has been...

title: Nvidia and Alphabet Both Have Amazing Potential in an AI Era. But Which Stock Is the Better Buy Right Now?
summary: Artificial intelligence has been a game changer for both companies. But which one is the better long-term bet?
